businessInfo.name: Clifton Auto Repair & Tire Services
businessInfo.tagline: Honest repairs. Real technicians. No surprises.

hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair You Can Trust.
hero.lead: ASE-certified technicians. Same-day service on most repairs. Clear pricing before we start.
whyBullets: Photo-backed diagnostics — we show you what is wrong.

about.heading: Where Expertise Meets Honesty
about.narrative: Clifton Auto Repair & Tire Services has been serving the local community for over 13 years. We are a family-owned shop that treats every customer like a neighbor — because most of our customers are. No upsells, no guesswork. Just honest work and fair prices.
bullets: Free digital inspections with photos and videos
Written estimates before any work begins

whyUsCards.title: Honest Diagnostics
whyUsCards.description: We show photos of every issue before recommending repairs.

whyUsCards.title: Real-Time Updates
whyUsCards.description: Text and email updates from check-in to pickup.

whyUsCards.title: 2-Year Warranty
whyUsCards.description: 24,000-mile parts and labor protection on every job.

services.name: Engine Diagnostic
services.description: Full-system diagnostic scan to identify warning lights and performance issues.

services.name: Brake Repair
services.description: Complete brake service — pads, rotors, calipers, fluid.

services.name: Oil & Filter Change
services.description: Keep your engine running clean with quality oil and a new filter.

services.name: Tires & Alignment
services.description: Tire mounting, balancing, rotation, and alignment.

services.name: State Inspection
services.description: State safety and emissions inspection. Fast turnaround.

deals.title: Oil Change Special
deals.description: Full synthetic oil change with filter. Up to 5 quarts.

deals.title: Brake Inspection
deals.description: No-charge brake inspection with any service visit.

testimonials.name: John D.
testimonials.quote: Best mechanic shop in the area. Upfront about the cost and finished faster than expected. Will definitely be back.

testimonials.name: Maria L.
testimonials.quote: Took my car in for a brake job. They showed me photos of the worn pads and explained everything. Fair price, great work.

testimonials.name: Carlos R.
testimonials.quote: Finally a mechanic I can trust. They did not try to upsell me on anything I did not need. Highly recommend.

faqs.question: How long does an oil change take?
faqs.answer: Most oil changes are done in 30–45 minutes. We will text you when your car is ready.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment?
faqs.answer: Walk-ins are welcome, but scheduling online ensures minimal wait time.

faqs.question: What warranty do you offer?
faqs.answer: All repairs come with a 24-month / 24,000-mile parts and labor warranty.

faqs.question: Do you offer loaner cars?
faqs.answer: Yes — call ahead and we will arrange a loaner for longer repairs.

emergency.heading: Car Won't Start? We're Here for You.
emergency.description: Emergency towing referrals and after-hours assistance available. Call us first.

contact.heading: Book Your Service
contact.description: Tell us what your vehicle needs and we will confirm timing and pricing quickly.
